# API Contracts

<!-- Generated by /caveman-docs:ai-context. Manual edits overwritten on re-run. -->

## AS IS — Current state

### No HTTP endpoints
No network API. Contracts are hook stdin/stdout JSON + slash-command frontmatter.

### Hook stdin/stdout contracts

| Hook | Event | Stdin | Stdout |
|------|-------|-------|--------|
| `caveman-docs-activate.js` | SessionStart | (unused) | Plain text: SKILL.md body prefixed with `CAVEMAN-DOCS ACTIVE — ...` |
| `caveman-docs-tracker.js` | UserPromptSubmit | JSON `{prompt: string}` | JSON `{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName, additionalContext}}` or empty |
| `caveman-docs-pre-write.js` | PreToolUse (matcher `Write\|Edit`) | JSON `{tool_name, tool_input: {file_path}}` | JSON `{hookSpecificOutput: {...}}` or empty |

### Example — UserPromptSubmit stdin

```json
{
  "prompt": "generate AGENTS.md for this repo"
}
```

### Example — UserPromptSubmit stdout (intent matched)

```json
{
  "hookSpecificOutput": {
    "hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit",
    "additionalContext": "CAVEMAN-DOCS: Detected AI doc write intent. Apply compression rules..."
  }
}
```

### Example — PreToolUse stdin

```json
{
  "tool_name": "Write",
  "tool_input": { "file_path": "/abs/path/to/docs/agents/architecture.md" }
}
```

### Example — PreToolUse stdout (AI doc matched)

```json
{
  "hookSpecificOutput": {
    "hookEventName": "PreToolUse",
    "additionalContext": "CAVEMAN-DOCS: \"architecture.md\" is an AI doc file. Apply compression rules..."
  }
}
```

### Slash-command frontmatter contract

```yaml
---
description: "<one-line>"
argument-hint: "<arg-shape>"
delegates-to: [doc-compressor]
---
```

Declared in `commands/init.md`, `commands/ai-context.md`, `commands/compress.md`.

### Command → agent invocation

| Command | scope | Extra input |
|---------|-------|-------------|
| `/caveman-docs:init <path>` | `init` | target path |
| `/caveman-docs:ai-context <path> [--repo-type=...]` | `full` | target, repo-type (default `auto`) |
| `/caveman-docs:compress [flags] [<path>]` | `compress` | target, list of discovered AI doc paths |
